lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਮਨਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam kee man preet |
lines.english: My mind is filled with love for the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਅਨੇਰਾ ਭੈ ਬਿਨਾਸੇ ਪਾਪ ਗਏ ਨਿਖੂਟਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dukh aneraa bhai binaase paap ge nikhoott |1|
lines.english: Pain, ignorance and fear have left me, and my sins have been dispelled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਪ ਤਾਪ ਅਨੇਕ ਕਰਣੀ ਸਫਲ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਨਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jaap taap anek karanee safal simarat naam |
lines.english: Chanting, deep meditation and various rituals are contained in the fruitful meditative remembrance of the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧ ਬਚਨ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਧਿਆਏ ਮਹਾ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਰੀਤਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mil saadh bachan gobind dhiaae mahaa niramal reet |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meeting the Holy Saint, under His Instruction, I meditate on the Lord of the Universe, in the most immaculate way. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਅਨੁਗ੍ਰਹੁ ਆਪਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਭਏ ਪੂਰਨ ਕਾਮ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kar anugrahu aap raakhe bhe pooran kaam |2|
lines.english: Showing His Mercy, the Lord Himself has protected me, and all my works have been brought to fruition. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਨ ਬਿਸਰੁ ਕਬਹੂੰ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਮਰਥ ॥
lines.translit: saas saas na bisar kabahoon braham prabh samarath |
lines.english: With each and every breath, may I never forget You, O God, Almighty Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦਰਦ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ਤਾਰਣ ਦਇਆਲ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਣ ॥
lines.translit: deen darad nivaar taaran deaal kirapaa karan |
lines.english: You are the Remover of the pains of the poor, the Savior, the Compassionate Lord, the Bestower of Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਅਨਿਕ ਰਸਨਾ ਕਿਆ ਬਖਾਨੈ ਅਗਨਤ ਸਦਾ ਅਕਥ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gun anik rasanaa kiaa bakhaanai aganat sadaa akath |3|
lines.english: How can my tongue describe Your countless virtues? They are uncountable, and forever indescribable. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਟਲ ਪਦਵੀ ਨਾਮ ਸਿਮਰਣ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਰਣ ॥੪॥੩॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: attal padavee naam simaran drirr naanak har har saran |4|3|29|
lines.english: Remembering the Naam in meditation, the state of eternal dignity is obtained; Nanak has grasped the protection of the Lord, Har, Har. ||4||3||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਉਖਧੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੀਨੋ ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਜੋਗੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har naam aaukhadh gur naam deeno karan kaaran jog |1|
lines.english: The Lord's Name is the medicine, which is potent to cure everything. The Guru has given me the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Goojaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹੰਬੁਧਿ ਬਹੁ ਸਘਨ ਮਾਇਆ ਮਹਾ ਦੀਰਘ ਰੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: ahanbudh bahu saghan maaeaa mahaa deeragh rog |
lines.english: Intellectual egotism and great love for Maya are the most serious chronic diseases.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਬਾਛੀਐ ਜਨ ਧੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: man tan baachheeai jan dhoor |
lines.english: My mind and body yearn for the dust of the Lord's humble servants.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਲਹਹਿ ਪਾਤਿਕ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਲੋਚਾ ਪੂਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kott janam ke laheh paatik gobind lochaa poor |1| rahaau |
lines.english: With it, the sins of millions of incarnations are obliterated. O Lord of the Universe, please fulfill my desire. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨ ਕੀਰਤਨ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਰਮਣੰ ਕਾਟੀਐ ਜਮ ਜਾਲ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur giaan keeratan gobind ramanan kaatteeai jam jaal |2|
lines.english: Through the Guru's spiritual wisdom, we sing the Kirtan of the Praises of the Lord of the Universe, and the noose of death is cut away. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਅੰਤੇ ਮਧਿ ਆਸਾ ਕੂਕਰੀ ਬਿਕਰਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: aad ante madh aasaa kookaree bikaraal |
lines.english: In the beginning, in the middle, and in the end, one is hounded by dreadful desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਲੋਭ ਮੋਹ ਮੂਠੇ ਸਦਾ ਆਵਾ ਗਵਣ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh moh mootthe sadaa aavaa gavan |
lines.english: Those who are cheated by sexual desire, anger, greed and emotional attachment suffer reincarnation forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਗੁਪਾਲ ਸਿਮਰਣ ਮਿਟਤ ਜੋਨੀ ਭਵਣ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: prabh prem bhagat gupaal simaran mittat jonee bhavan |3|
lines.english: By loving devotional worship to God, and meditative remembrance of the Lord of the World, one's wandering in reincarnation is ended. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਪੁਤ੍ਰ ਕਲਤ੍ਰ ਸੁਰ ਰਿਦ ਤੀਨਿ ਤਾਪ ਜਲੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: mitr putr kalatr sur rid teen taap jalant |
lines.english: Friends, children, spouses and well-wishers are burnt by the three fevers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮਾ ਦੁਖ ਨਿਵਾਰੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਸੰਤ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jap raam raamaa dukh nivaare milai har jan sant |4|
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord, Raam, Raam, one's miseries are ended, as one meets the Saintly servants of the Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣ ਸਰਣ ਅਪਾਰ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੁ ਗਹੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਓਟ ॥੫॥੪॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: har charan saran apaar prabh ke drirr gahee naanak ott |5|4|30|
lines.english: Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of the Lotus Feet of the Infinite Lord; he holds fast to their Support. ||5||4||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਬਿਧਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਤੇ ਪੁਕਾਰਹਿ ਕਤਹਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਛੋਟਿ ॥
lines.translit: sarab bidh bhramate pukaareh kateh naahee chhott |
lines.english: Wandering around in all directions, they cry out, "Nothing can save us!"

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੪ ਦੁਪਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree mahalaa 5 ghar 4 dupade |
lines.english: Goojaree, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House, Dho-Padhay:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਰਮਣ ਸ੍ਰਵਣ ਅਪਾਰ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਫਿਰਿ ਨ ਹੋਤ ਬਿਓਗੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gun raman sravan apaar mahimaa fir na hot biog |1|
lines.english: Uttering His Praises, and hearing of His infinite glory, you shall never suffer separation from Him again. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਰਾਧਿ ਸ੍ਰੀਧਰ ਸਫਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: aaraadh sreedhar safal moorat karan kaaran jog |
lines.english: Worship and adore the Lord of wealth, the fulfilling vision, the Almighty Cause of causes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਚਰਣਾਰਬਿੰਦ ਉਪਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: man charanaarabind upaas |
lines.english: O my mind, worship the Lord's Lotus Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਕਲੇਸ ਮਿਟੰਤ ਸਿਮਰਣਿ ਕਾਟਿ ਜਮਦੂਤ ਫਾਸ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kal kales mittant simaran kaatt jamadoot faas |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance, strife and sorrow are ended, and the noose of the Messenger of Death is snapped. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤ੍ਰੁ ਦਹਨ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਕਹਨ ਅਵਰ ਕਛੁ ਨ ਉਪਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satru dehan har naam kehan avar kachh na upaau |
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord, and your enemies shall be consumed; there is no other way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਅਨੁਗ੍ਰਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਮੇਰੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਸੁਆਉ ॥੨॥੧॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: kar anugrahu prabhoo mere naanak naam suaau |2|1|31|
lines.english: Show Mercy, O my God, and bestow upon Nanak the taste of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||2||1||31||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Goojaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਸਰਨਿ ਕੋ ਦਾਤਾ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਸੁਖ ਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: toon samarath saran ko daataa dukh bhanjan sukh raae |
lines.english: You are the Almighty Lord, the Giver of Sanctuary, the Destroyer of pain, the King of happiness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਠਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: govind tujh bin avar na tthaau |
lines.english: O Lord of the Universe, without You, there is no other place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਹਿ ਕਲੇਸ ਮਿਟੇ ਭੈ ਭਰਮਾ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਗੁਣ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਗਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jaeh kales mitte bhai bharamaa niramal gun prabh gaae |1|
lines.english: Troubles depart, and fear and doubt are dispelled, singing the Glorious Praises of the Immaculate Lord God. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਿ ਲਗੇ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਨੀ ਵਡੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sev lage har charanee vaddai bhaag liv laagee |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, I am attached to the Lord's Lotus Feet; by great good fortune, I have embraced love for Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਜਪੀ ਤੁਮਾਰਾ ਨਾਉ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa paarabraham suaamee japee tumaaraa naau | rahaau |
lines.english: Show Mercy to me, O Supreme Lord Master, that I may chant Your Name. ||Pause||
